posts.author: Arseny (Arseny Bandurin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I have situations in my tables where the same coordinates are assigned to different objects. If I switch on the ‘map’ view mode, such objects are grouped and displayed as a circle with the number of elements. When I click on the circle, nothing happens.
How can I get information about what kind of elements are grouped behind these circles?

Here is what I mean: https://youtu.be/PABq8VvfGZk

There is no way to get information on them from the map. Not even to understand the exact address to manually filter on the map.
